allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Folders:', d.get\('folders', 'MISSING'\)\); print\('Nodes with folder_path:', sum\(1 for n in d['nodes'] if 'folder_path' in n\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Folders:', json.dumps\(d.get\('folders'\), ensure_ascii=False\)\); print\('First node folder_path:', d['nodes'][0].get\('folder_path','MISSING'\)\)")
